You need to accomplish two things in this phase:
1. Execute the approved Gold materialisation rules to produce analytics-ready Gold Parquet tables from the Silver inputs, applying all approved joins, renames, and aggregations.

Think about what the business question needs and whether the Gold tables are structured to answer it. Verify the Gold tables are populated before dispatching the Reporter. Plan which tools to call and in what order. Verify each output before proceeding.

args.goal: Materialize analytics-ready Gold Parquet tables from the Silver inputs using the approved Gold STTM. This will involve applying all approved joins, renames, and aggregations to prepare the data for reporting.

Generate a self-contained HTML executive report based on the Gold tables. The report should include: 1. Top 3 selling products, 2. Top 2 selling stores, 3. Total sales, 4. Number of unique products and stores, and 5. Any other relevant KPIs. The report should include visualisations (charts) for the analysis.
